articles.title: 2 top stock recommendations from Rajesh Bhosale
articles.description: Indian stock markets are experiencing significant volatility. Investors are advised to remain cautious in the short term. Experts suggest a staggered approach to buying quality stocks for long-term gains. The IT sector shows relative strength, with Tech Mahindra highlighted as a stock to watch. Conversely, Bharat Forge is seen as bearish.

dailyNews.description: The president threatened to "obliterate" Iranian power plants if Iran didn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz by late Monday night Eastern Daylight Time.

dailyNews.title: Poll: Most say Iran war not going well, but don't want regime left in power
dailyNews.description: Most Republicans, especially MAGA, continue to support the US action and express a lot of confidence in Trump personally.

dailyNews.title: Trump calling in ICE agents for airport security as DHS shutdown continues
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says ICE officers will be stationed at hotspot U.S. airports starting Monday to assist with TSA screenings. They will undergo some training before then. Skyler Henry reports.

dailyNews.title: Collapse of U.S. shipbuilding poses national and economic security risks | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: China rolls out over 1,000 cargo ships a year, while the U.S. – maybe three. The Trump administration has called this a crisis with both economic and national security risks.

dailyNews.title: The American rare earths company seeking to topple China's dominance | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is working with a U.S. company to challenge China's dominance over rare earth elements. The metals are essential for components in smartphones, robotics, fighter jets, and drones.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise as Trump’s Hormuz ultimatum and Iran threats keep markets on edge
dailyNews.description: Fears over a prolonged disruption in the Strait of Hormuz have kept investors on edge as oil prices swung in volatile trading Monday.

dailyNews.description: Tensions between Trump and Tehran rise as the clock ticks on the U.S. President's Hormuz ultimatum.

dailyNews.description: European stocks started the new trading week sharply lower as the war in Iran drags on global market sentiment.

dailyNews.title: The economy has a Strait of Hormuz deadline for Trump: Two weeks
dailyNews.description: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.

dailyNews.title: Iran unswayed by Trump's 48-hour deadline and threats to 'obliterate' energy infrastructure
dailyNews.description: Iran has threatened to escalate strikes on energy infrastructure should President Donald Trump make good on a promise to “obliterate” the country’s power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Matt Bradley reports from Tel Aviv, Israel.
